description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the logstash:2.3.2 Docker image for a job named logstash-2.3.2. Add a global before_script that runs `logstash-plugin install --development` and then copies the local patterns directory to `/etc/logstash/patterns`. In the logstash-2.3.2 job execute the script `./tests/bin/run-tests.sh all y`. Use the default stage (test) and do not define any caches, artifacts, services, or rules.
